project_type: Static HTML website with CSS design system and vanilla JS
verification_instructions: Open the HTML file in a browser; verify calculator logic via node execution of the JS
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML project
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs possible. Only pre-installed runtimes available. No Docker.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing page patterns (asuransi-mobil.html as reference). Use shared CSS from /assets/style.css. Load header/footer via JS. Support dark mode. Use keyword highlight classes with different colors.
key_patterns: 1) Pages use inline <style> for page-specific CSS with custom color variables. 2) Header loaded into #site-header, footer into #site-footer. 3) main.js loaded at end of body handles components, dark mode, search, scroll. 4) Question-style copywriting with keyword highlights (.kw-finance, .kw-protect, .kw-risk). 5) Calculator wrapped in .calc-wrap with .calc-header and .calc-body. 6) Premium tables use .premi-table-wrap and .premi-table classes. 7) Dark mode via html.dark class with CSS overrides. 8) Breadcrumb navigation at top. 9) FAQ accordion with toggleFaq function. 10) CTA section at bottom linking to WhatsApp.
directory_structure: public/pages/ - product HTML pages; public/assets/ - shared CSS and JS; public/components/ - header.html and footer.html loaded via JS; Source/ - PDF source documents; Sample/ - sample HTML files
